questions.question: Housekeeping department ka mukhya kaam kya hai?

options.B: Hotel ki saaf-safai aur maintenance

questions.explanation: Housekeeping department hotel ki cleanliness, orderliness, aur overall appearance ko maintain karne ke liye responsible hota hai.

questions.question: Ek Housekeeping Supervisor ki sabse important quality kya hai?

options.B: Team ko lead karna aur motivate karna

questions.explanation: Ek achha supervisor apni team ko sahi direction deta hai, unhe motivate karta hai aur unke saath milkar kaam karta hai.

questions.question: Duty Roster banate waqt kis baat ka dhyan rakhna zaroori hai?

options.A: Sabhi staff ko barabar kaam aur chutti mile
options.B: Sirf senior staff ko aasan shift mile
options.D: Staff ki pasand ka dhyan na rakha jaye

questions.explanation: Ek fair duty roster se team ka morale high rehta hai aur sabhi ko rest ka poora mauka milta hai, jisse productivity badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapka team member baar-baar late aa raha hai, to aapka pehla step kya hoga?

options.B: Sabke saamne uski beizzati karenge
options.C: Akele mein usse baat karke wajah janne ki koshish karenge

questions.explanation: Ek professional supervisor pehle problem ki jad tak jaata hai. Private conversation se staff comfortable feel karta hai aur sahi wajah batata hai.

questions.question: Briefing ya Debriefing meeting ka mukhya uddeshya kya hota hai?

options.B: Din bhar ke kaamo ko discuss karna aur feedback dena

questions.explanation: Briefing shift shuru hone se pehle din ke tasks batane ke liye hoti hai, aur Debriefing shift ke baad din bhar ke kaam ka review aur feedback ke liye hoti hai.

questions.question: 'Grooming Standards' ka housekeeping staff ke liye kya matlab hai?

options.B: Saaf uniform, saaf baal aur proper hygiene maintain karna

questions.explanation: Proper grooming se staff professional dikhta hai aur hotel ki image achhi banti hai. Isme saaf uniform, shoes, aur personal hygiene shamil hai.

questions.question: Hotel me 'High Occupancy' ke time ek supervisor ko tasks kaise prioritize karne chahiye?

options.A: Sabse pehle public areas ko ignore karna
options.B: Check-out rooms ko pehle saaf karna taaki naye guest aa sakein
options.C: Sirf VIP rooms par dhyan dena
options.D: Team ko unke haal par chhod dena

questions.explanation: High occupancy me revenue management ke liye zaroori hai ki check-out rooms jaldi se jaldi taiyar ho jayein, taaki naye check-ins ho sakein.

questions.question: Ek naye staff member ko train karne ki process ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Warning

questions.explanation: Induction me naye staff ko company policies aur unke kaam ke baare me bataya jaata hai. On-the-job training me unhe practical kaam sikhaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar do team members ke beech jhagda ho jaye to supervisor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Dono ko ignore kar dena
options.C: Dono se alag-alag aur fir ek saath baat karke samasya suljhana
options.D: Dono ko naukri se nikal dena

questions.explanation: Ek achhe supervisor ka kaam hai team me harmony banaye rakhna. Dono parties ko sunkar ek fair solution nikalna sabse aacha tarika hai.

questions.question: Housekeeping me 'Inventory Management' ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Cleaning supplies, linen, aur amenities ka stock maintain karna

questions.explanation: Inventory management me yeh sunishchit kiya jaata hai ki department ke paas kaam karne ke liye zaroori saaman (supplies, linen) hamesha aavashyak matra me uplabdh ho.

questions.question: Kaun sa department housekeeping ke saath 'room status' update ke liye sabse zyada coordinate karta hai?

options.B: Front Office

questions.explanation: Housekeeping room saaf hone ke baad Front Office ko inform karta hai (e.g., Vacant Clean), taaki woh naye guest ko room allot kar sakein.

questions.question: Ek 'Job Description' (JD) kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek document jismein uss post ke duties aur responsibilities likhi hoti hain

questions.explanation: Job Description ek formal document hota hai jo batata hai ki ek particular role me kaam karne wale व्यक्ति se kya-kya kaam karne ki ummeed ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Team ko motivate karne ka sabse accha tarika kya hai, jab budget kam ho?

options.A: Unke kaam ki sarvajanik roop se prashansa karna (Public recognition)
options.B: Unpar aur zyada kaam daalna

questions.explanation: Jab financial incentives (jaise bonus) dena possible na ho, tab team ke achhe kaam ko sabke saamne recognize karna unka manobal badhane ka ek bahut prabhavi tarika hai.

questions.question: 'Delegation of authority' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Apne kaam aur usse judi zimmedari ko apni team ke members ko saumpna
options.C: Kaam karne se mana kar dena
options.D: Sirf junior staff se kaam karwana

questions.explanation: Delegation ka matlab hai supervisor apne kuch tasks aur unko karne ki authority apne subordinates ko deta hai. Isse team members develop hote hain aur supervisor important kaam par focus kar pata hai.

questions.question: Key Control system housekeeping me kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Guest ki suraksha aur privacy ke liye
options.D: Sirf staff ki pareshani badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Key control system se yeh track kiya jaata hai ki kaun si key kiske paas hai, jisse guest rooms ki security aur guest ki privacy sunishchit hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek supervisor ko apni team se feedback kaise lena chahiye?

options.B: Sirf galti karne par
options.C: Ek open aur friendly mahol banakar, jisme staff bina dare apni baat keh sake

questions.explanation: Jab supervisor ek trust ka mahol banata hai, toh team members department ko behtar banane ke liye constructive feedback aur suggestions dete hain.

questions.question: SOP ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Supervisor On Patrol

questions.explanation: SOP ek document hota hai jismein kisi bhi kaam ko karne ka step-by-step tarika likha hota hai, taaki quality aur consistency maintain ho.

questions.question: Floor ki safai ke liye istemal hone wale chemical ko aam taur par kya kehte hain?

options.B: Toilet cleaner

questions.explanation: Floor cleaner specially floors se mitti, daag aur germs hatane ke liye banaya jaata hai. Industry me Taski R2 jaise code-named chemicals aam hain.

questions.question: Chemicals ko handle karte samay PPE pehanna kyu zaroori hai? PPE ka full form kya hai?

options.A: Personal Protective Equipment, skin aur saans ki suraksha ke liye
options.B: Personal Private Equipment, zaroori nahi hai
options.C: Public Protection Equipment, doosron ke liye

questions.explanation: PPE jaise gloves, mask, goggles, staff ko harmful chemicals ke સીधे contact me aane se bachate hain, jisse skin irritation, allergies ya anya health problems se suraksha milti hai.

questions.question: pH scale par 7 se neeche wale solution ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Acidic (Amliya)

questions.explanation: pH scale 0 se 14 tak hota hai. 7 neutral (jaise paani) hota hai, 7 se kam acidic (jaise toilet cleaner) aur 7 se zyada alkaline (jaise degreaser) hota hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Wet & Dry Vacuum Cleaner' ka kya upyog hai?

options.A: Sirf sookha kachra uthane ke liye
options.B: Sirf paani ya liquid uthane ke liye
options.C: Sookha kachra aur liquid dono saaf karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Yeh machine versatile hoti hai aur sookhi mitti ke saath-saath gile spills ko bhi saaf kar sakti hai, jo ise bahut upyogi banata hai.

questions.question: Cleaning agents ko dilute (paani milana) karne ka sahi tarika kya hai?

options.B: Pehle paani daalein, fir chemical

questions.explanation: Hamesha paani me chemical dheere-dheere milana chahiye. Isse chemical ke chheente udne (splashing) ka khatra kam ho jaata hai, jo ki suraksha ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: MSDS ka full form kya hai aur yeh kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Material Safety Data Sheet, chemical ki suraksha jaankari ke liye
options.B: Maximum Safety Drill Sheet, drill ke liye
options.C: Material Supply Demand Sheet, stock ke liye
options.D: Master Safety Data System, computer ke liye

questions.explanation: MSDS har chemical ke saath aane wala ek document hai jisme uske khatron, first-aid upchar, aur aapat sthiti me kya karna hai, iski poori jaankari hoti hai.

questions.question: Kis prakaar ke daag hatane ke liye acidic cleaner (e.g., toilet bowl cleaner) ka istemal hota hai?

options.B: Mineral deposits, jaise paani ke kathor daag (hard water stains)

questions.explanation: Acidic cleaners mineral deposits aur zung (rust) jaise daago ko dissolve karne me prabhavi hote hain, jo aksar bathrooms aur toilets me paaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Floor scrubbing machine ka istemal kab kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Jab floor par bahut zyada gandagi ya purani polish ki parat ho

questions.explanation: Floor scrubbing machine deep cleaning ke liye hoti hai. Iske hard bristles aur pressure, sakht gandagi ko nikal dete hain jo normal mopping se nahi nikalti.

questions.question: Colour-coded cleaning system (jaise Red for toilets, Blue for general area) kyu use kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Hotel ko rang-biranga banane ke liye
options.B: Cross-contamination (ek jagah ke germs doosri jagah फैलने) ko rokne ke liye
options.C: Staff ko confuse karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Alag-alag rang ke kapde aur tools alag-alag areas ke liye use karne se high-risk areas (jaise toilet) ke germs, low-risk areas (jaise guest room) me nahi failte.

questions.question: Ek 'all-purpose cleaner' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf ek hi cheez saaf kar sakta hai
options.B: Yeh bahut saari alag-alag satah (surfaces) par istemal kiya ja sakta hai
options.D: Yeh sirf kitchen me use hota hai

questions.explanation: All-purpose cleaner ko is tarah se banaya jaata hai ki woh floors, walls, glass, aur anya kai satah par surakshit roop se kaam kar sake.

questions.question: Cleaning equipment jaise vacuum cleaner ka regular maintenance kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki woh jaldi kharab ho jaye
options.B: Taki woh aache se kaam kare aur uski life lambi ho

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance (jaise filter saaf karna, bag khali karna) se machine ki efficiency bani rehti hai, woh aacha result deti hai aur jaldi kharab nahi hoti.

questions.question: Kitchen me grease (tel/chiknai) saaf karne ke liye kis tarah ka chemical sabse prabhavi hoga?

options.B: Alkaline cleaner (Degreaser)

questions.explanation: Alkaline cleaners (jinka pH 7 se zyada hota hai) tel aur chiknai ko todne me bahut kargar hote hain, isliye inhe degreaser bhi kaha jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar galat chemical mix kar diye jaayein (jaise bleach aur ammonia), to kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Zehrili gas (Toxic gas) ban sakti hai jo jaanleva ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Kuch chemicals ko milane se dangerous chemical reactions ho sakte hain, jisse zehrili gas nikal sakti hai. Isliye chemicals ko kabhi bhi mix nahi karna chahiye jab tak specifically nirdesh na ho.

questions.question: 'Disinfectant' aur 'Sanitizer' me kya mukhya antar hai?

options.B: Disinfectant germs ko maarta hai, jabki Sanitizer germs ki sankhya ko surakshit level tak kam karta hai
options.D: Disinfectant sirf hospitals me use hota hai

questions.explanation: Disinfectants 99.999% tak bacteria aur virus ko khatm karte hain. Sanitizers germs ko ek safe level tak kam karte hain, jo public health standards ke anusaar hota hai. Disinfection ek higher level ki cleaning hai.

questions.question: Housekeeping trolley ko aur kya kehte hain?

options.B: Linen Truck

questions.explanation: Housekeeping trolley ko aam taur par Maid's Cart ya Room Attendant's Cart bhi kaha jaata hai. Isme room servicing ke liye zaroori sabhi samaan hota hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa equipment carpet se daag nikalne (spotting) ke liye istemal hota hai?

options.B: Carpet Extractor Machine

questions.explanation: Carpet extractor machine paani aur chemical solution ko carpet ke andar inject karti hai aur fir gande paani ko wapas kheench leti hai, jisse daag aur gandagi nikal jaati hai.

questions.question: Chemicals ko store karne ka sahi sthan kaun sa hai?

options.B: Kitchen me khane ke paas
options.C: Ek thande, sookhe aur well-ventilated store room me, lock ke andar

questions.explanation: Chemicals ko surakshit roop se ek alag, aache se havadar aur band store me rakhna chahiye taaki durghatnaon aur galat istemal se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Guest room ki safai ka pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Darwaza khatkhatana aur enter karne ki anumati lena

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle darwaze par knock karke aur 'Housekeeping' bolkar guest ki privacy ka samman karna zaroori hai, chahe room vacant hi kyu na dikh raha ho.

questions.question: Ek 'occupied' room aur ek 'vacant' room ke room status me kya farak hai?

options.B: Occupied me guest hai, vacant khaali hai
options.C: Vacant me guest hai, occupied khaali hai

questions.explanation: 'Occupied' ka matlab hai ki room me guest ruka hua hai. 'Vacant' ka matlab hai ki room khaali hai.

questions.question: Bed banate samay, sabse neeche kaun si sheet bichhai jaati hai?

options.B: Top sheet

questions.explanation: Bed making procedure me mattress ke upar sabse pehle bottom sheet (fitted ya flat) bichhai jaati hai.

questions.question: Agar guest room ke darwaze par 'DND' (Do Not Disturb) sign laga ho, to supervisor ko staff ko kya nirdesh dena chahiye?

options.A: Darwaza khatkhatate raho jab tak koi khol na de
options.B: Master key se room khol lo
options.C: Uss room ko disturb na karein aur apni report me note karein
options.D: Guest ko phone karke pareshan karein

questions.explanation: DND sign guest ki privacy ka anurodh hai. Staff ko iska samman karna chahiye aur uss room ko skip karke supervisor ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Guest room me 'amenities' kya hoti hain?

options.B: Guest ke use ke liye di jaane wali cheezein jaise soap, shampoo, tea/coffee kit

questions.explanation: Amenities woh complimentary items hote hain jo hotel guest ke comfort aur convenience ke liye provide karta hai.

questions.question: Ek check-out room ko saaf karne ke baad, supervisor ka sabse aakhiri aur important kaam kya hota hai?

options.B: Room ko final inspect karna ki sab kuch standard ke anusaar hai ya nahi
options.C: Front office ko bina bataye chale jaana

questions.explanation: Supervisor ki zimmedari hai ki woh room ko inspect karke yeh sunishchit kare ki safai, amenities placement aur sabhi cheezein hotel ke standard ke mutabik hain, iske baad hi room Front Office ko 'Vacant Clean' mark kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar room ki safai ke dauran guest ka koi keemti saaman (jaise wallet ya phone) milta hai, to kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use apni jeb me rakh lena chahiye
options.B: Use wahin chhod dena chahiye
options.C: Turant apne supervisor ko inform karna chahiye aur 'Lost and Found' procedure follow karna chahiye
options.D: Apne co-worker ko de dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Hotel ki policy ke anusaar, guest ka koi bhi mila hua saaman turant supervisor ko report karna hota hai aur use Lost and Found department me jama karwana hota hai. Yeh imaandari aur professional behaviour ka prateek hai.

questions.question: Room ki dusting karte samay sahi tarika kya hai?

options.A: Neeche se upar ki taraf (Bottom to top)
options.B: Upar se neeche ki taraf (Top to bottom)
options.C: Kahin se bhi shuru kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Hamesha upar se neeche ki taraf dusting karni chahiye taaki upar ki dhool neeche gire aur aakhir me floor par aa jaye, jise baad me saaf kiya ja sake. Isse kaam dobara nahi karna padta.

questions.question: Ek 'Turn-down service' aam taur par kab di jaati hai?

options.B: Dopahar me lunch ke time
options.C: Shaam ko, guest ke sone se pehle room ko taiyar karne ke liye
options.D: Yeh service hoti hi nahi hai

questions.explanation: Turn-down service ek luxury service hai jo shaam ko di jaati hai. Isme bed ko sone ke liye ready kiya jaata hai, parde lagaye jaate hain aur halki safai ki jaati hai taaki guest ko aaramdayak anubhav mile.

questions.question: Agar guest room me smoking ki gandh (smell) aa rahi ho aur woh ek non-smoking room ho, to use hatane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Room ko aache se ventilate karna, ozonizer machine ka istemal karna aur deep cleaning karna

questions.explanation: Smoking ki gandh pardo, carpet aur furniture me bas jaati hai. Ise hatane ke liye sirf air freshener kaafi nahi. Proper ventilation, deep cleaning aur professional equipment jaise ozonizer ki zaroorat padti hai.

questions.question: Room inspection checklist ka kya upyog hai?

options.B: Yeh sunishchit karna ki room ka har kona aur har item standard ke anusaar saaf aur aache se kaam kar raha hai

questions.explanation: Checklist ek tool hai jo supervisor ko systematic tareeke se room inspect karne me madad karti hai, taaki koi bhi cheez (safai, maintenance, amenities) chhoote nahi.

questions.question: Agar guest room me bed bugs (khatmal) ki shikayat aati hai to supervisor ka immediate action kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Guest ko kehna ki woh jhoot bol raha hai
options.B: Guest ko turant doosra room offer karna aur uss room ko out-of-order karke pest control ke liye schedule karna
options.C: Uss room me spray chhidak dena

questions.explanation: Guest comfort aur safety sabse pehle hai. Unhe turant doosra saaf room dena chahiye. Uske baad, uss room ko seal karke professional pest control team ko bulana zaroori hai taaki problem aage na faile.

questions.question: Minibar me items ko replenish karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Guest ne jo items consume kiye hain, unhe fir se bhar dena
options.C: Minibar ko room se hata dena

questions.explanation: Replenish karne ka matlab hai jo bhi drinks ya snacks guest ne use kar liye hain, unki jagah naye items rakhna aur consumption ko charge ke liye Front Office ko report karna.

questions.question: Ek 'Vacant Dirty' room ko 'Vacant Clean' banane ke process ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Room Inspection

questions.explanation: Room servicing woh poora process hai jisme ek gande, khaali room ko saaf karke, bed banakar, amenities replenish karke naye guest ke liye taiyar kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Bathroom me 'high-touch points' kaun se hote hain jin par disinfection zaroori hai?

options.B: Taps, flush handle, door knob, light switch

questions.explanation: High-touch points woh jagah hoti hain jinhe baar-baar chhua jaata hai, isliye wahan germs failne ka khatra sabse zyada hota hai. Inhe aache se disinfect karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar guest aapse extra towel maangta hai to aapka kya response hona chahiye?

options.B: Extra charge maangna
options.C: Politely aur jaldi se unki request poori karna
options.D: Unhe front desk par call karne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Guest ki suvidha aur santushti housekeeping staff ki prathmikta hoti hai. Aisi requests ko hamesha namrata se aur tezi se poora karna chahiye.

questions.question: VIP guest ke room ko service karte waqt kya extra dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Wahan normal se kam safai karni chahiye
options.B: Guest ki preferences (pasand) ka khaas dhyan rakhna chahiye aur extra amenities provide karni chahiye
options.C: Room ko jaldi-jaldi saaf karna chahiye
options.D: Koi extra dhyan ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: VIP guests ke liye service standard aur bhi uncha hota hai. Unki pasand-napasanad ka (agar pata ho) dhyan rakha jaata hai aur unhe special feel karane ke liye extra amenities jaise fruits, flowers etc. rakhe jaate hain.

questions.question: Hotel me 'Public Areas' (PA) me kya shamil hai?

options.B: Lobby, corridors, elevators, restaurants, washrooms

questions.explanation: Public Areas woh jagah hoti hain jahan sabhi guests jaa sakte hain. In areas ki saaf-safai hotel ki image ke liye bahut mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: Lobby me floor par kuch liquid gir jaaye (spill), to pehla action kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Uske sookhne ka intezar karna
options.C: Turant 'Wet Floor' sign lagana aur use saaf karna
options.D: Guest ko uske upar se jaane dena

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle 'Wet Floor' sign lagana zaroori hai taaki koi guest fisal kar gir na jaaye. Uske baad spill ko turant saaf karna chahiye.

questions.question: Public Area Attendant (PAA) ki mukhya zimmedari kya hai?

options.B: Hotel ke public areas ko din bhar saaf aur presentable rakhna

questions.explanation: PAA lobby, corridors, public washrooms jaise areas ki cleanliness ke liye responsible hote hain, taaki hotel hamesha saaf-suthra dikhe.

questions.question: Marble floor ki polishing ke process ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Mopping

questions.explanation: Crystallization ek chemical process hai jisse marble me mirror-like shine aati hai. Buffing ek high-speed machine se ki jaati hai taaki floor ki chamak bani rahe.

questions.question: Raat ki shift me public areas ki 'Deep Cleaning' kyu ki jaati hai?

options.A: Kyunki raat me andhera hota hai
options.B: Kyunki raat me guest traffic kam hota hai, jisse kaam me badha nahi aati
options.C: Kyunki staff din me sona pasand karta hai

questions.explanation: Raat me guest activity bahut kam ho jaati hai, isliye heavy machines ka istemal karke floor scrubbing, polishing jaise bade kaam aasaani se aur bina guest ko pareshan kiye kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Banquet hall me event ke baad sabse pehli safai ki prakriya kya hoti hai?

options.B: Garbage clearance (kachra saaf karna) aur leftover food hatana

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle mota-mota kachra, plates aur bacha hua khana hataya jaata hai taaki badbu na faile aur aage ki safai ke liye jagah ban sake.

questions.question: Hotel me Pest Control (keet niyantran) kiske saath coordinate karke kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Ek professional pest control agency ke saath milkar
options.C: Hotel ka staff khud hi kar leta hai

questions.explanation: Pest control ek specialized kaam hai jiske liye licensed professionals ki zaroorat hoti hai. Housekeeping department unke saath coordinate karke schedule banata hai.

questions.question: High-rise building ke bahar ke sheeshe (facade) saaf karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Specialized equipment jaise cradle ya scaffolding aur safety harnesses
options.C: Andar se hi saaf kar sakte hain
options.D: Unhe saaf karne ki zaroorat nahi hoti

questions.explanation: Unchi buildings par bahar se safai karna ek high-risk kaam hai. Iske liye trained professionals aur special safety equipment jaise cradle (suspended platform) aur harnesses anivarya hain.

questions.question: Public washrooms ko din me kitni baar check aur saaf karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab koi complaint kare tab
options.C: Regular intervals par, har ghante ya do ghante me, usage ke anusaar

questions.explanation: Public washrooms high-traffic areas hote hain. Inki saaf-safai aur supplies (toilet paper, soap) ko regular basis par check karna zaroori hai taaki hygiene standards maintain rahen.

questions.question: Swimming pool area ki safai me kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Pool deck ki safai, sun loungers ko arrange karna, aur paani ki chemical levels ko check karna

questions.explanation: Housekeeping pool ke aas-paas ke area (deck) ki safai aur furniture arrangement ke liye responsible hota hai, jabki paani ki quality maintenance team dekhti hai. Dono ke beech coordination zaroori hai.

questions.question: Horticulture department housekeeping se kaise juda hai?

options.B: Horticulture hotel ke andar aur bahar ke plants aur gardens ka dhyan rakhta hai, jo hotel ki sundarta badhata hai

questions.explanation: Horticulture (gardening) department hotel ke landscapes, indoor plants aur floral arrangements ko maintain karta hai, jo ki public areas ke aesthetic appeal ka ek important hissa hai.

questions.question: Elevator (lift) ke tracks (darwaze ki patti) ko saaf rakhna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki elevator ka darwaza aasaani se aur bina aawaz ke khul-band ho sake

questions.explanation: Agar tracks me dhool, mitti ya kachra jama ho jaaye to lift ke darwaze अटक sakte hain ya aawaz kar sakte hain, jo ki ek safety aur maintenance issue hai.

questions.question: Lobby me rakhe flower vase ka paani roz kyu badalna chahiye?

options.B: Taki phool taaze rahen aur paani me badbu aur machhar paida na hon
options.D: Taki phool jaldi kharab ho jayein

questions.explanation: Ruke hue paani me bacteria panapte hain jisse badbu aati hai aur phool jaldi murjha jaate hain. Saaf paani se phool zyada din tak taaze rehte hain aur hygiene bhi maintain rehta hai.

questions.question: Restaurant ki safai ke liye 'opening' aur 'closing' duties ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf darwaza kholna aur band karna
options.B: Opening: Restaurant khulne se pehle sab kuch saaf aur taiyar karna. Closing: Restaurant band hone ke baad agle din ke liye sab kuch saaf karke rakhna.
options.C: Yeh kitchen staff ka kaam hai

questions.explanation: Yeh systematic cleaning procedures hain jo sunishchit karte hain ki restaurant din bhar saaf rahe aur agle din ki service ke liye hamesha taiyar rahe.

questions.question: Back-of-the-house (BOH) areas me kya shamil hai?

options.B: Staff cafeteria, offices, corridors jahan guest nahi jaate

questions.explanation: BOH woh areas hote hain jo staff ke kaam karne ke liye hote hain aur guest access se door hote hain. Inki safai bhi utni hi zaroori hai jitni public areas ki.

questions.question: Ek 'periodic cleaning' schedule kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek aisa schedule jo weekly, monthly ya quarterly ki jaane wali special safai ke liye banaya jaata hai (jaise carpet shampooing, window washing)

questions.explanation: Periodic cleaning un kaamo ko cover karti hai jo rozana nahi kiye jaate lekin hotel ke maintenance ke liye bahut zaroori hain. Inhe aam taur par deep cleaning tasks kaha jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar lobby me furniture par scratch aa gaya hai, to supervisor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use chhipane ki koshish karni chahiye
options.B: Maintenance/Engineering department ko iski soochna deni chahiye
options.D: Us furniture ko store me rakhwa dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Housekeeping ka kaam sirf safai nahi, balki cheezon ki dekhbhal bhi hai. Koi bhi damage ya tooti hui cheez ko turant Maintenance department ko report karna chahiye taaki use theek kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Hotel me 'Linen' shabd ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Bed sheets, pillow covers, towels, table cloths jaise kapde

questions.explanation: Linen un sabhi dhone yogya kapdo ko kehte hain jo guest rooms, restaurants aur banquets me istemal hote hain.

questions.question: Laundry me kapdo ko dhone se pehle 'sorting' (chhatna) kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Rang, kapde ke type aur gandagi ke level ke hisab se alag karne ke liye, taaki sahi washing ho sake

questions.explanation: Galat sorting se safed kapdo par rang chadh sakta hai ya delicate kapde kharab ho sakte hain. Alag-alag kapdo ko alag-alag temperature aur chemical treatment ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Linen inventory me 'Par Stock' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Total linen jo hotel ke paas hai
options.B: Ek set of linen jo smooth operation ke liye zaroori hai (Ek use me, ek dhulne me, ek store me)

questions.explanation: Aam taur par 3 Par Stock rakha jaata hai. 1 Par hotel me use ho raha hota hai, 1 Par laundry me dhul raha hota hai, aur 1 Par linen room me store rehta hai. Isse kabhi linen ki kami nahi hoti.

questions.question: Agar towel par khoon (blood) ka daag laga ho, to use kis paani se treat karna chahiye?

options.B: Thanda paani

questions.explanation: Blood ek protein-based daag hai. Garam paani protein ko paka deta hai (coagulate), jisse daag pakka ho jaata hai. Isliye ise hamesha pehle thande paani se treat karna chahiye.

questions.question: Uniform Room ka kya kaam hota hai?

options.B: Staff ko saaf uniform issue karna aur gandi uniform collect karna

questions.explanation: Uniform room yeh sunishchit karta hai ki sabhi staff members ko unki shift ke liye saaf, press ki hui aur aachi condition me uniform mile.

questions.question: 'Linen Chute' kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek vertical shaft jiske zariye upar ke floors se ganda linen seedhe laundry me bheja jaata hai

questions.explanation: Bade hotels me linen chute ka istemal hota hai taaki staff ko ganda linen lift ya seedhiyon se neeche na laana pade. Isse samay aur mehnat bachti hai.

questions.question: Agar guest apni personal laundry dhulwane ke liye deta hai, to housekeeping staff ko sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Guest ke saamne kapdo ki ginti karna aur laundry list par sign karwana
options.C: Kapde dhone se mana kar dena

questions.explanation: Yeh ek standard procedure hai taaki baad me koi confusion na ho ki kitne kapde diye gaye the. Isse transparency bani rehti hai aur disputes se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Fati hui (torn) bedsheet ka kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use theek karke guest room me bhej dena chahiye
options.B: Use fenk dena chahiye
options.C: Use 'discard' pile me alag karna chahiye, jise baad me duster banane ya anya kaamo me use kiya ja sakta hai
options.D: Use guest ko de dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Fata hua ya daag wala linen guest ke saamne nahi jaana chahiye kyunki isse hotel ki image kharab hoti hai. Aise linen ko circulation se hata diya jaata hai.

questions.question: Saaf linen ko kahan store karna chahiye?

options.B: Ek saaf, sookhi aur band almirah ya room me

questions.explanation: Saaf linen ko dhool, mitti aur nami se bachakar rakhna zaroori hai taaki woh istemal ke samay tak saaf aur fresh rahe.

questions.question: 'OPL' ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Off-Premises Laundry

questions.explanation: On-Premises Laundry ka matlab hai ki hotel ki apni khud ki laundry facility hai, jahan woh apne saare kapde dhote hain.

questions.question: Tumble Dryer machine ka laundry me kya kaam hai?

options.B: Kapde sukhana

questions.explanation: Dhule hue geele kapdo ko garam hawa ki madad se sukhane ke liye tumble dryer ka istemal kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Linen ka physical count (ginna) regular basis par kyu kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Yeh ek bekar ka kaam hai
options.B: Stock level check karne, chori ya nuksaan ka pata lagane, aur aage ki khareedari plan karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf staff ko busy rakhne ke liye
options.D: Taki linen ko ganda kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Regular physical inventory (stock-taking) se pata chalta hai ki kitna linen use ho raha hai, kitna kharab ho gaya hai aur kitna stock me hai. Yeh budgeting aur cost control ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa chemical kapdo ko safed karne aur daag nikalne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Detergent

questions.explanation: Bleach ek powerful oxidizing agent hai jo safed kapdo se rang-birange daag hatata hai aur unhe aur safed banata hai. Ise rangin kapdo par use nahi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Staff ko uniform exchange karne ke liye 'soiled for fresh' policy ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Staff jab chahe jitni uniform le sakta hai
options.B: Staff ko ek gandi uniform jama karne par hi ek saaf uniform milegi
options.C: Staff ko uniform khareedni padti hai

questions.explanation: Yeh policy uniform inventory ko control karne me madad karti hai. Isse yeh sunishchit hota hai ki staff ke paas extra uniforms jama na ho aur sabhi uniforms circulation me rahen.

questions.question: Linen room ka in-charge kaun hota hai?

options.B: Linen Supervisor ya Linen Keeper

questions.explanation: Linen Supervisor ya Linen Keeper linen room ke operations, inventory, aur linen ke distribution ke liye zimmedar hota hai.

questions.question: Table napkin (rumal) ko alag-alag shapes me fold karke rakhne ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Table ki presentation aur sundarta badhane ke liye
options.C: Yeh housekeeping ka kaam nahi hai

questions.explanation: Napkin folding ek art hai jisse restaurant ya banquet tables ka look aur feel enhance hota hai aur guests par aacha prabhav padta hai.

questions.question: Hotel me aag lagne par aapko sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Chup-chap bahar nikal jaana
options.C: Fire alarm activate karna aur apne supervisor/security ko inform karna
options.D: Aag bujhane ki koshish karna, bhale hi aag badi ho

questions.explanation: Sabse pehla kaam alarm bajakar sabko saavdhan karna aur emergency services ko soochit karna hai, taaki professional help jaldi se jaldi pahunch sake.

questions.question: Fire Extinguisher istemal karne ke liye PASS technique ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Pull, Aim, Squeeze, Sweep

questions.explanation: PASS ek acronym hai: P-Pull the pin, A-Aim at the base of the fire, S-Squeeze the handle, S-Sweep from side to side. Yeh fire extinguisher chalane ka sahi aur yaad rakhne me aasan tarika hai.

questions.question: Housekeeping staff ko kaam karte samay 'Wet Floor' sign ka istemal kab karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab bhi floor par mopping ya koi liquid gira ho

questions.explanation: Yeh sign guests aur staff ko chetavni deta hai ki floor geela aur fisalneyogya hai, jisse girne ki durghatnaon se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko hotel me koi sandigdh (suspicious) vyakti ya laawaris bag dikhe to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Use ignore kar dena chahiye
options.C: Turant apne supervisor aur security department ko soochit karna chahiye
options.D: Us vyakti se jaakar jhagda karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Aise mamlo me staff ko khud koi action nahi lena chahiye. Apni suraksha aur doosron ki suraksha ke liye turant security ko inform karna sabse sahi kadam hai.

questions.question: Choti-moti chot ya katne par First-Aid me sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Ghaav ko saaf paani se dhona aur antiseptic lagakar patti karna
options.D: Doctor ke aane ka intezar karna

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle ghaav ko saaf karna zaroori hai taaki infection na faile. Uske baad antiseptic lagakar use cover karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek 'Emergency Evacuation Plan' kya hota hai?

options.B: Aapat sthiti (jaise aag, bhukamp) me building ko surakshit roop se khaali karne ka plan

questions.explanation: Is plan me emergency exits, assembly points aur staff ki zimmedariyon ka ullekh hota hai, taaki aapat sthiti me sabhi log surakshit bahar nikal sakein.

questions.question: Agar guest lift me phans jaaye to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Lift ka darwaza zabardasti kholne ki koshish karni chahiye
options.B: Guest ko shaant rehne ke liye kehna chahiye, intercom se unse baat karni chahiye aur turant Maintenance/Security ko inform karna chahiye
options.C: Unhe unke haal par chhod dena chahiye
options.D: Lift ke button baar-baar dabane chahiye

questions.explanation: Aise me guest ghabra jaata hai. Unhe reassure karna zaroori hai. Saath hi, is problem ko theek karne ke liye turant trained personnel (Maintenance/Engineering) ko bulana chahiye.

questions.question: Bio-Hazard waste (jaise khoon se sani patti) ko kaise dispose karna chahiye?

options.B: Toilet me flush kar dena
options.C: Ek alag, aache se marked (chinhit) bag me, hotel ki policy ke anusaar

questions.explanation: Bio-hazard waste se infection failne ka khatra hota hai. Isliye ise special laal ya peele rang ke bags me daalkar, aache se seal karke, designated jagah par dispose kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Master Key ki suraksha itni zaroori kyu hai?

options.A: Kyunki woh sone ki bani hoti hai
options.B: Kyunki isse hotel ke kai ya sabhi kamre khul sakte hain, aur iska galat istemal guest ki suraksha ke liye bada khatra hai
options.D: Taki staff aaram se koi bhi room khol sake

questions.explanation: Master key ek badi zimmedari hai. Agar yeh galat haathon me chali jaaye to chori ya anya apradh ho sakte hain. Isliye iska control bahut sakht hota hai.

questions.question: Bhari saaman (jaise mattress) uthate samay, staff ko apni peeth (back) ko chot se bachane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apne ghutne modkar (squat) aur peeth seedhi rakhkar uthana chahiye

questions.explanation: Sahi lifting technique me pairo ka istemal hota hai, na ki peeth ki maanspeshiyon ka. Isse peeth par zor nahi padta aur chot lagne ka khatra kam ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar kaam karte waqt aapko chakkar aa raha ho ya tabiyat kharab lage to kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Chup-chap ghar chale jaana chahiye
options.C: Turant kaam rokkar apne supervisor ko batana chahiye

questions.explanation: Apni sehat ko nazarandaaz karna aapke liye aur doosron ke liye khatarnak ho sakta hai. Supervisor ko batane se aapko medical help mil sakti hai aur aapka kaam koi aur handle kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Hotel me 'Bomb Threat' (bomb ki dhamki) ka phone aane par, phone uthane wale ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Phone karne wale se jhagda karna chahiye
options.C: Jitna ho sake phone ko lamba kheenchkar, caller ki aawaz, background noise aur anya jaankari note karni chahiye aur turant security ko alert karna chahiye
options.D: Is baat ko mazak me lena chahiye

questions.explanation: Bomb threat calls ko bahut gambhirta se liya jaata hai. Jitni zyada jaankari ikatthi ki jaa sake, utna hi security agencies ko jaanch karne me aasaani hoti hai. Iske liye staff ko trained kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: CPR ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Central Processing Room

questions.explanation: CPR ek first-aid technique hai jo kisi vyakti ki saans ya dil ruk jaane par uski jaan bachane ke liye istemal ki jaati hai, jab tak medical help na pahunch jaaye.

questions.question: Guest ki privacy ka samman karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Guest ke room me bina knock kiye ghus jaana
options.B: Guest ki baaton ko sunna aur doosron ko batana
options.C: Guest ke room me knock karna, unke saaman ko na chhedna, aur unki jaankari gupt rakhna
options.D: Guest se unki personal life ke baare me poochhna

questions.explanation: Hospitality industry me guest ki privacy sarvopari hai. Yeh professional ethics ka ek moolbhoot hissa hai.

questions.question: Kaam ke sthan par surakshit mahol banaye rakhne ki zimmedari kiski hai?

options.B: Sirf staff ki

questions.explanation: Management ka kaam hai surakshit policies aur equipment provide karna, aur staff ka kaam hai un policies ka palan karna aur unsafe conditions ko report karna. Yeh ek sajha zimmedari hai.

questions.question: Aag lagne par lift (elevator) ka istemal kyu nahi karna chahiye?

options.A: Lift aag me jaldi pahunchati hai
options.B: Lift me dhuan bhar sakta hai ya power fail hone se aap usme phans sakte hain
options.C: Lift me bheed ho jaati hai
options.D: Lift ka istemal kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Aag lagne par hamesha seedhiyon (stairs) ka istemal karna chahiye. Lift ek band box ki tarah hoti hai jo aag ke dauran ek trap ban sakti hai.
